mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsJobStepDao.selectViewList */ select cc.code as job_step_cd , cc.code_nm as job_step_nm , case when ubjs.bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked from cmmt_code cc left outer join uspt_bsns_job_step ubjs on ubjs.job_step_cd = cc.code and ubjs.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd} where cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@JS_CODE_GROUP}' and cc.enabled = true order by cc.code_type desc, cc.sort_order
